节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: JSON is a syntax for serializing objects, arrays, numbers, strings, booleans, and null.
The type of conversion result function.
注释信息: @param { Object } this - The object to which the parsed key value pair belongs.
@param { Object } value - The value of the parsed key value pair.

节点.功能描述: Converts a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) string into an Object or null. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } text - A valid JSON string.
@param { Transformer } [reviver] - A function that transforms the results.
@returns { Object | null } Return an Object, array, string, number, boolean, or null value corresponding to JSON text.

parameters.说明: Transformer } [reviver] - A function that transforms the results.

节点.return_description: Return an Object, array, string, number, boolean, or null value corresponding to JSON text.

节点.功能描述: Converts a JavaScript value to a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) string. for selecting the object properties that will be stringify. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Object } value - A JavaScript value, usually an Object or array.
@param { (number | string)[] | null } [replacer] - An array of strings and numbers that acts as an approved list
@param { string | number } [space] - Adds indentation, white space, and line break characters to the return-value JSON text to make it easier to read.

parameters.说明: A JavaScript value, usually an Object or array.
string | number } [space] - Adds indentation, white space, and line break characters to the return-value JSON text to make it easier to read.

节点.功能描述: Converts a JavaScript value to a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) string. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Object } value - A JavaScript value, usually an Object or array.
@param { Transformer } [replacer] - A function that transforms the results.
@param { string | number } [space] - Adds indentation, white space, and line break characters to the return-value JSON text to make it easier to read.

parameters.说明: A JavaScript value, usually an Object or array.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the object parsed from a JSON string contains the property.
注释信息: @param { object } obj - The object parsed from a JSON string.
@param { string } property - Determine whether the object contains the property.
@returns { boolean } Return true if the key is in the object, otherwise return false.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: The object parsed from a JSON string.
Determine whether the object contains the property.

节点.return_description: Return true if the key is in the object, otherwise return false.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Removes a property from the object parsed from a JSON string.
注释信息: @param { object } obj - The object parsed from a JSON string.
@param { string } property - The property to be removed.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: The object parsed from a JSON string.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Enum defining modes for handling bigint.
Parse as BigInt when number less than -(2^53 – 1) or greater than (2^53 – 1).
Enum defining modes for handling bigint.
